parameters.name: list_ads
parameters.description: Lists all ads within a specific ad group. Returns ad ID, status, final URLs, and copy (headlines/descriptions).

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to list ads from.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_ad
parameters.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific ad by its ad group ID and ad ID.

value.adId: ={{ $fromAI('adId', 'The ID of the ad to retrieve.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_responsive_search_ad
parameters.description: Creates a new Responsive Search Ad (RSA). Requires adGroupId, status (PAUSED or ENABLED), a finalUrl, 3 headlines, and 2 descriptions.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'ID of the Ad Group to place the ad in.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_ad
parameters.description: Updates the status of an existing Ad Group Ad (e.g., to pause or enable it). Ad copy is typically updated by creating a new ad and pausing the old one.

parameters.name: pause_ad
parameters.description: Sets an ad's status to PAUSED. Requires adGroupId and adId.

parameters.name: enable_ad
parameters.description: Sets an ad's status to ENABLED. Requires adGroupId and adId.

parameters.name: remove_ad
parameters.description: Sets an ad's status to REMOVED (deleted). Requires adGroupId and adId.

parameters.jsCode:
if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row.adGroupAd || {} }));

if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row }));
